name: Zinnia Flamegrip
sd_appearance: Small, wiry kobold with fiery red hair and piercing green eyes clad in chain mail, carrying a warhammer and a crossbow. Skin is scaly and battle-scarred, shoulders constantly tense. One distinctive visual detail: a Guild badge proudly displayed on her chest, a symbol of her unranked status in the Adventurers Guild. Her worn leather and chainmail tell a story of past contracts and the relentless pursuit of proving herself as a true warrior.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
